nodes.name: Developer
nodes.notes: Delegates coding to the bridge's /code-task (clone + real agent + push), then opens the PR, writes docs, and moves the card to In Review.

parameters.content:
## 2 — Developer (real-agent)
Polls To Do every 5 minutes (backend first), locks one card, and ships it via the bridge:

1. Read repo/track + stack/role (and API docs for front/mobile) and build an **agent brief**.
2. Call **POST /code-task** on the bridge → it clones the repo on the Mac, runs the active CLI engine (claude/agy) inside the checkout with full tools + auto-approve, commits & pushes `task/<cardId>`.
3. Open a **PR to develop** with the changed-file list.
4. Write per-task docs; for backend also append to `docs/api/API.md`.
5. After the last backend task, release **Waiting API** cards to To Do.
6. Move card to **In Review**, notify Bale, trigger WF3.

If the task branch already exists → **fix mode** (the agent patches the real working tree, no rewrite).

Needs an active **CLI** engine (claude/agy). The GapGPT (HTTP) engine cannot drive the agent yet — see the Aider phase.
